groups.name: Platform Engineering
groups.description: Core platform infrastructure: service mesh, telemetry, feature flags, and shared runtime tooling

groups.name: Identity & Access
groups.description: Authentication, authorisation, SSO, MFA, and user directory services

groups.name: Data Platform
groups.description: Data warehousing, ETL pipelines, stream processing, schema registry, and data governance

groups.name: Commerce
groups.description: Order management, product catalogue, pricing, fulfilment, and customer-facing shopping flows

groups.name: Customer Experience
groups.description: Customer profiles, self-service portal, support ticketing, surveys, and loyalty programmes

groups.name: Mobile
groups.description: iOS, Android, and React Native applications plus their dedicated backend services

groups.name: Analytics & BI
groups.description: Event tracking, funnel analysis, A/B testing, dashboards, and revenue metrics

groups.name: DevOps
groups.description: CI/CD pipelines, deployment orchestration, artifact management, and release governance

groups.name: Security
groups.description: Threat detection, vulnerability management, encryption, DLP, and compliance gating

groups.name: Finance Systems
groups.description: Invoicing, general ledger, accounts payable/receivable, tax reporting, and financial forecasting

groups.name: HR Technology
groups.description: Employee lifecycle, payroll integration, performance management, and learning systems

groups.name: Notifications
groups.description: Email, SMS, push, and in-app notification routing, templating, and delivery tracking

groups.name: Content Management
groups.description: CMS, media library, CDN management, translation services, and brand assets

groups.name: Partner Integrations
groups.description: B2B API gateway, EDI, ERP/CRM connectors, webhook management, and marketplace adapters

groups.name: Machine Learning & AI
groups.description: Recommendation engines, fraud detection, NLP pipelines, model serving, and MLOps tooling

groups.name: Infrastructure
groups.description: Cloud resource provisioning, networking, backups, DR, monitoring, and cost optimisation

groups.name: Quality Assurance
groups.description: Test orchestration, load testing, contract testing, and test data management

groups.name: API Gateway
groups.description: External API entry points, rate limiting, versioning, developer portal, and request routing

groups.name: Search
groups.description: Full-text search indexing, faceted navigation, autocomplete, and personalised ranking

groups.name: Payments
groups.description: Payment processing, card vault, PSP adapters, fraud checks, payouts, and settlements

groups.name: Inventory
groups.description: Stock management, warehouse operations, replenishment, supplier integration, and forecasting

groups.name: Logistics
groups.description: Carrier integration, shipment tracking, route optimisation, customs, and last-mile delivery

groups.name: Compliance & Audit
groups.description: GDPR, PCI-DSS, SOX compliance, data retention, right-to-erasure, and regulatory reporting
